title: hygrophila angustifolia var. assurgens
intro: Hygrophila angustifolia var. assurgens, also known as Assurgent Water Hygrophila, is a perennial aquatic plant belonging to the family Acanthaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Hygrophila angustifolia var. assurgens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to promote wound healing and skin health.
